channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Western Cape Premier Alan Winde challenges ethics breach finding over New York trip
item.description: Western Cape Premier Alan Winde has come under scrutiny after the provincial legislature’s conduct committee found him in breach of its code of conduct for failing to declare a sponsored trip to New Y...

item.title: NSCDC Leadership Transition Delayed as Outgoing Commandant-General Allegedly Refuses Handover to Senior Deputy Over Ethnic Concerns
item.description: The outgoing Commandant-General of the Nigeria Security and Civil Defence Corps (NSCDC), Ahmed Audi, don officially retire on Friday after him reach the mandatory retirement age and finish him tenure ...

item.title: Flightradar24 tracks global air traffic during crises and major events
item.description: Flightradar24, a Swedish flight tracking platform originally created as a tool to support a flight price comparison website, has become a leading resource for monitoring global aviation events in real...

item.title: Canadian Tourist Piper James Drowned After Dingo Attack in Australia
item.description: Authorities in Australia have confirmed that Piper James, a 19-year-old Canadian from Campbell River, B.C., died as a result of drowning caused by injuries sustained during a dingo attack. James, who ...

item.title: Iran imposes nationwide internet shutdown amid military conflict, endangering civilians
item.description: On 28 February 2026, shortly after military strikes by the United States and Israel, the Iranian government imposed a nationwide internet blackout. Within a week, only about 1% of normal internet acti...

item.title: US Congress rejects limits on Trump’s military action in Iran amid Tehran leadership concerns
item.description: On Thursday, the US House of Representatives narrowly voted 219–212 against a resolution that would have required President Donald Trump to seek congressional approval before expanding military operat...

item.title: Queimada Grande: Facts About Brazil’s Restricted Snake Island
item.description: Queimada Grande, often sensationalized as 'the deadliest island on Earth,' is a small island off the coast of São Paulo, Brazil, known for its endemic Golden Lancehead snakes (Bothrops insularis). The...

item.title: Russell Wilson Reiterates Criticism of Sean Payton as 'Classless' in Recent Podcast Interview
item.description: Russell Wilson, the veteran NFL quarterback and free agent following his 2025 stint with the New York Giants, has reignited his longstanding tension with Denver Broncos head coach Sean Payton. In a re...

item.title: Nobantu Vilakazi: Shaping Amapiano Through Voice, DJing and Collaboration
item.description: Nobantu Vilakazi has emerged as a prominent figure in the South African music scene, celebrated for her versatility as a DJ, vocalist, songwriter, and hitmaker. She first gained national attention in ...

item.title: Louisiana utility worker critically injured after cherry picker catches fire
item.description: In Baton Rouge, Louisiana, a utility worker named Bevan Dupre suffered severe burns after being left dangling from a cherry picker that caught fire due to a suspected mechanical failure. The incident ...

item.title: Pakistan Army Chief Reaffirms Swift Action Against Any Threats
item.description: Chief of Army Staff Field Marshal Syed Asim Munir has declared that Pakistan will respond decisively to any act of aggression against its sovereignty. Speaking to Daily Jang at a luncheon held for Jor...

item.title: Heated Rivalry Fandom Highlights Platform Differences in Online Discourse
item.description: The WIRED article examines why discussions around the hit series Heated Rivalry—a queer romance between two closeted hockey players—feel particularly awkward and divisive online. On Tumblr, the show h...

item.title: Manitoba Proposes New Legislation on Crime, Public Safety, and Health Policies
item.description: The Manitoba government introduced over a dozen bills in the provincial legislature on Thursday, aiming to strengthen public safety, improve health policy, and implement measures outlined in last fall...

item.title: No Ultimatum from World Bank or Supreme Court for Marcos’ Resignation
item.description: A viral claim circulating online alleged that the World Bank and the Supreme Court of the Philippines demanded the resignation of President Ferdinand Marcos Jr., with Vice President Sara Duterte set t...

item.title: Improving Tanzania’s Tax Reform Process and Budget Consultation Time
item.description: Tanzania's budget cycle officially starts in August with the Ministry of Finance issuing Planning and Budget Preparation Guidelines. Ministries, agencies, local authorities, and public corporations th...

item.title: Tubi Mohammed Wins Isiolo South By-Election and Takes Office
item.description: Nairobi, Kenya – Tubi Mohammed Tubi has officially been sworn in as the new member of parliament for Isiolo South Constituency after clinching victory in the recent by-election held last Thursday. Rep...

item.title: Chardham Yatra Online Registration Commences Today
item.description: The online registration process for the Chardham Yatra, one of the most revered pilgrimages in India, has commenced today. Devotees planning to undertake this sacred journey to the four holy shrines—Y...

item.title: Karnataka government assists 50 stranded citizens from UAE to return safely via Delhi
item.description: On the morning of March 6, 2026, around 50 individuals from Karnataka, who had been stranded in the UAE due to the ongoing West Asia conflict, arrived safely at Delhi airport. They had boarded a fligh...

item.title: Nadia Nakai clarifies relationship rumours with Toss and discusses upcoming reality show
item.description: Rapper Nadia Nakai has addressed rumours circulating on social media regarding a potential romance with fellow musician Toss, following a Valentine’s Day video that went viral. Speaking to Sowetan, Na...

item.title: The Social and Political Impact of Unemployment and Insecure Work
item.description: The outlook for job seekers in the UK is deteriorating, with unemployment projected to rise to 5.3% this year due to weak economic growth and uncertainty for employers. While political debates often f...
